rule: PostHog new-platform CTR on /coupons/{merchant} pages. >=70% clicks/views = FALSE_POSITIVE, 30-70% = INCONCLUSIVE, <30% with <=15 clicks = LOW_VOLUME, <30% with >15 clicks = REAL_ISSUE

merchants.name: Athleta
merchants.notes: 16 clicks in 7 days is below the validation threshold. Athleta's pre-cache-fix pageview history (May 5-7: 0/0/0) suggests cache was eating most of its traffic - re-evaluate after 14 days of post-fix data.

merchants.name: Oakley
merchants.notes: PostHog shows 119 clicks on 129 pageviews on the new platform (92.2% CTR). Real users are clicking. BQ 9.6% is dragged down by email/scanner traffic. Do not file a ticket.

merchants.name: Build-A-Bear
merchants.notes: PostHog shows 138 clicks on 155 pageviews (89% CTR). Healthy new-platform engagement. BQ 12.8% is the email/scanner artifact again.

merchants.name: Levi's
merchants.notes: PostHog new-platform CTR is 21.5% (higher than BQ 13.9% but still below the ~50% baseline). 53 clicks in 7 days is enough volume to be meaningful. Worth watching for another week before filing a ticket.
